UMH.purpose: Universal Mastery Hierarchy — modular, AI-native, role-driven business operating system substrate that formalizes how businesses are structured and run
UMH.architecture: 4-layer canonical architecture: substrate → adapters → transports → projections. Single type system. Abstract ports for cross-layer communication. Instance-agnostic substrate.
UMH.runtime_model: Organism model with OrchestratorKernel, WorkPackets, runtime fleet (VPS + Windows Beast), sandbox/worktree scoped execution, dry-run-only cadence
UMH.operator_experience: Operator loop coordinator with acceptance testing, permission dialogues, approval gates. Operator must approve all mutations.
UMH.governance: Deterministic-first principle. Risk classification. Recursion governance. 4-gate pre-commit system (type coherence, instance context, projection boundary, dependency direction).
UMH.source_of_truth: /opt/OS on VPS is production truth for UMH substrate. 695 substrate files, 131 organism files.

EOS.purpose: EntrepreneurOS — the Operating System That Makes Business Plug and Play. AI-native business operating system for entrepreneurs.
EOS.target_user: Entrepreneurs, founders. Initial product: Initiate Arena ($750, 90-day discipline/execution program for men 18-25).
saas_functions: 10 department agents (CEO, Sales, Marketing, Finance, Customer Success, HR, Legal, Operations, Product, Engineering)
CRM pipeline (prospect → qualified → proposal → negotiation → closed → active)
KPI dashboards (revenue, leads, conversion, outreach, response rate)
EOS.backend_state: PARTIAL on VPS at /opt/OS/saas — Hono/Drizzle/Neon. 12 API route files, 13 DB tables, 9 migrations. Missing frontend, auth, deployment config.
EOS.frontend_state: NOT PRESENT on VPS. Likely on Windows Beast at /dev. Technology unknown until inspected.
current_source_locations: Windows Beast /dev — candidate full app source (uninspected)
EOS.relation_to_empyrean_studios: Empyrean Studio is a creative studio entity under Lyfe Corp. Separate from EOS but may share UMH substrate.
EOS.relation_to_portfolios: EOS manages ventures within portfolios. Portfolio → Company → Department → Role hierarchy defined in projections/eos/entities.py.
EOS.schema_version_split: Integration layer uses v1 schema (crm_contacts, crm_deals, crm_activities). SaaS backend uses v2 schema (events, clients, ventures, transactions, offers). These are divergent.

CreatorOS.purpose: Creator platform OS — for content creators managing posts, products, revenue, stories, and audience.
saas_functions: Post management (text, image, video, story, reel, thread, blog, newsletter)
Product listing (digital, physical, course, template, merch, service, subscription)
source_locations: Windows Beast /dev — candidate full app source (uninspected)
CreatorOS.relation_to_creators: SaaS for creators to manage their entire creative business. References schema at /opt/OS/data/repos/creatoros/shared/schema.ts (existence unverified on VPS).
CreatorOS.canonicality_assessment: INTEGRATION_ONLY on VPS. No application-layer code. Full app likely on Windows Beast.

LyfeOS.purpose: Life optimization/gamification OS — comprehensive personal development system with quests, stats, daily logs, vision goals.
LyfeOS.target_user: Individuals pursuing personal development, self-improvement. Linked to Game of Lyfe concept.
saas_functions: Quest system (categories: general, setup, rituals, life_pillars; difficulties: S/A/B/C/D)
User stats tracking (XP, level, streaks, completion rates)
source_locations: Windows Beast /dev — candidate full app source (uninspected)
LyfeOS.relation_to_game_of_lyfe: Game of Lyfe is the next rung on Lyfe Institute's offer ladder after Initiate Arena. LyfeOS is the technology platform. Gamified, AI-powered. IN DEVELOPMENT — after Initiate Arena succeeds.
LyfeOS.canonicality_assessment: INTEGRATION_ONLY on VPS. No application-layer code. Full app likely on Windows Beast.

shared_infrastructure: UMH substrate (types, execution, governance) — universal across all projections
Python bridge pattern — shared API-to-substrate communication
SharedTrinity.shared_auth: Firebase auth planned (ARCHITECTURE.md). Auth middleware exists in transports/api/http/middleware/. Not yet confirmed which auth system is deployed.
SharedTrinity.shared_runtime: All three projections share the organism runtime (coordinator, workcells, execution pipeline). Runtime fleet manages VPS + Windows Beast.
SharedTrinity.shared_data_model: substrate/types.py defines 30+ Pydantic models shared across projections. Each projection has its own DB schema but shares SignalEnvelope, OutcomeEnvelope, CapabilityRequest/Response types.
SharedTrinity.shared_ui_patterns: Unknown — no frontend source on VPS. Must inspect Windows Beast /dev.
SharedTrinity.shared_agent_workflow_systems: EOS has DepartmentAgent base class. Pattern not shared to CreatorOS/LyfeOS yet. Workflow base pattern exists in substrate but projection-specific workflows are per-projection.
SharedTrinity.code_duplication_concern: Integration layer pattern (7 files) is nearly identical across all three projections. _require_str, _require_int, outcome severity, OutcomeReceiver, connection management are copy-pasted. Candidate for shared base package.
SharedTrinity.cross_product_permissions: ARCHITECTURE.md references cross_product_permissions for user-granted data sharing between projections. Not yet implemented.
